title: BEM-570 Telegram mobile mailbox
objective:
Run script:
"""
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'TELEGRAM_MOBILE_READABLE_FORMAT.md'
protocol.write_text('''# BEM-570 | Telegram Mobile Readable Format

Дата: 2026-05-17 | 21:26 (UTC+3)

## Решение

| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |
|---|---|---|
| Telegram tables | Запрещены для оперативных уведомлений | На мобильном экране строки переносятся и становятся нечитаемыми |
| Формат | Короткие секции и отдельные строки | Удобно читать в Telegram |
| Канон | Шапка `Этап` и `Дорожная карта` сохраняется | Требование оператора |
| Табличный канон | Разрешён в repo reports, но не в Telegram notification body | В файлах таблицы читаемы, в Telegram — нет |

## Telegram notification format

```text
BEM-MAILBOX | AUDIT MAILBOX | workflow_runtime

Этап: 1/1 (100%)
Дорожная карта: 1/1 (100%)

Чек-лист:
✅ Новое сообщение mailbox обнаружено
✅ Отправитель определён
✅ Получатель определён

Сообщение:
От: Claude
Кому: GPT
Тема: ...
Файл: governance/audit_mailbox/...

Действие:
Прочитать файл и ответить в mailbox.
```
''')

picker=scripts/'mailbox_pick_notification.py'
picker_lines=[
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'MAILBOX_DIRS = [',
'    Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt"),',
'    Path("governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude"),',
']',
'STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json")',
'TMP_DIR = Path("governance/tmp")',
'PICK_PATH = TMP_DIR / "mailbox_pick.json"',
'MSG_PATH = TMP_DIR / "mailbox_message.txt"',
'',
'def load_state():',
'    if STATE_PATH.exists():',
'        try:',
'            return json.loads(STATE_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'        except Exception:',
'            return {}',
'    return {}',
'',
'def title_from_markdown(path):',
'    try:',
'        for line in path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore").splitlines():',
'            if line.startswith("# "):',
'                return line[2:].strip()[:96]',
'    except Exception:',
'        pass',
'    return path.name',
'',
'def infer_sender_recipient(path):',
'    s = str(path)',
'    if "claude_to_gpt" in s:',
'        return "Claude", "GPT"',
'    if "gpt_to_claude" in s:',
'        return "GPT", "Claude"',
'    return "unknown", "unknown"',
'',
'def compact_path(path):',
'    text = str(path)',
'    if len(text) <= 90:',
'        return text',
'    return text[:42] + "…" + text[-42:]',
'',
'def build_message(path):',
'    sender, recipient = infer_sender_recipient(path)',
'    title = title_from_markdown(path)',
'    short_path = compact_path(path)',
'    lines = [',
'        "BEM-MAILBOX | AUDIT MAILBOX | workflow_runtime",',
'        "",',
'        "Этап: 1/1 (100%)",',
'        "Дорожная карта: 1/1 (100%)",',
'        "",',
'        "Чек-лист:",',
'        "✅ Новое сообщение mailbox обнаружено",',
'        "✅ Отправитель определён",',
'        "✅ Получатель определён",',
'        "",',
'        "Сообщение:",',
'        f"От: {sender}",',
'        f"Кому: {recipient}",',
'        f"Тема: {title}",',
'        f"Файл: {short_path}",',
'        "",',
'        "Действие:",',
'        "Прочитать файл в repo и ответить через mailbox.",',
'        "",',
'        "Причина:",',
'        "Асинхронная синхронизация Claude↔GPT без оператора-relay.",',
'    ]',
'    return "\\n".join(lines)',
'',
'state = load_state()',
'seen = set(state.get("sent_files", []))',
'candidates = []',
'for d in MAILBOX_DIRS:',
'    if d.exists():',
'        candidates.extend(sorted([p for p in d.glob("*.md") if p.is_file()], key=lambda p: str(p)))',
'picked = None',
'for path in candidates:',
'    if str(path) not in seen:',
'        picked = path',
'        break',
'TMP_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'if picked is None:',
'    pick = {"picked": False, "message": "", "mailbox_file": None}',
'    MSG_PATH.write_text("", encoding="utf-8")',
'else:',
'    message = build_message(picked)',
'    pick = {"picked": True, "message": message, "mailbox_file": str(picked)}',
'    MSG_PATH.write_text(message, encoding="utf-8")',
'PICK_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(pick, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\\n", encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps({"picked": pick["picked"], "mailbox_file": pick["mailbox_file"]}, ensure_ascii=False))',
]
picker.write_text('\n'.join(picker_lines)+'\n')

# Ensure workflow keeps syntax check. No schedule trigger.
workflow=wfs/'mailbox-dispatcher.yml'
if workflow.exists():
    wf_text=workflow.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'python3 -m py_compile scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py scripts/mailbox_record_delivery.py' not in wf_text:
        wf_text=wf_text.replace('      - name: Pick mailbox notification\n', '      - name: Syntax check mailbox scripts\n        run: |\n          python3 -m py_compile scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py scripts/mailbox_record_delivery.py\n\n      - name: Pick mailbox notification\n')
        workflow.write_text(wf_text)

report=reports/'bem570_telegram_mobile_friendly_mailbox.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-570 | Telegram Mobile-friendly Mailbox Format | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 21:26 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\nMailbox Telegram notifications no longer use table-style lines. They now use mobile-readable sections: `Сообщение`, `Действие`, `Причина`. Canonical header with stage and roadmap percentages remains.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
record={'record_type':'bem570_telegram_mobile_friendly_mailbox','cycle_id':'bem570-telegram-mobile-friendly-mailbox','source':'gpt','status':'completed','script':str(picker),'protocol':str(protocol),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 21:26 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem570_telegram_mobile_friendly_mailbox']={'status':'completed','script':str(picker),'format':'mobile_sections_no_tables','blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 21:26 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem570_telegram_mobile_friendly_mailbox.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-570 PASS: mailbox Telegram notifications switched from table-style to mobile-readable sections.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(picker),str(workflow),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Converted mailbox Telegram notifications to mobile-readable non-table format')
"""
No issue comments.
